chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

text: 1561 - رَوَى بُكَيْرُ بْنُ أَعْيَنَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «مَا صَلَّى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اَلضُّحَى قَطُّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1561 - Bukayr ibn A'yan narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that He said:
"The Messenger of Allah (sw) never prayed the Duha prayer."
